name: xcontacts
description: Professional email contact extractor — scan IMAP mailboxes and harvest contacts

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run start:prod
scripts.vercel-build: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build
